mapper.select: SELECT id, chat_id AS chatId, from_user_id AS fromUserId, msg_id AS msgId, media_id AS mediaId, pic_url AS picUrl, qiniu_url AS qiniuUrl, ticket_id AS ticketId, status, expire_time AS expireTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, create_by AS createBy, update_by AS updateBy, deleted FROM wecom_pending_image WHERE deleted = 0 AND chat_id = #{chatId} AND from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND create_time >= #{windowStart} ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT id, chat_id AS chatId, from_user_id AS fromUserId, msg_id AS msgId, media_id AS mediaId, pic_url AS picUrl, qiniu_url AS qiniuUrl, ticket_id AS ticketId, status, expire_time AS expireTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, create_by AS createBy, update_by AS updateBy, deleted FROM wecom_pending_image WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'PENDING' AND expire_time < #{now} ORDER BY expire_time ASC LIMIT 200
